childhood.familyBackground: Father was a teacher who headed a local primary school; family of modest means
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 아버지는 지역 초등학교를 주도한 교사였으며, 가정은 중산층 수준
childhood.education: Formal education cut short due to family hardship; self-educated through work and mentorship
childhood.educationKo: 가정 어려움으로 정규 교육이 단절됨. 근무와 멘토십을 통해 자기주도 학습
childhood.earlyLife: Born July 29, 1928. Family fled to Hong Kong in 1940 during Japanese invasion. Father died of tuberculosis when Li was 15. Dropped out of school to work and support family, starting as a salesman in plastics trading company, working 16 hours daily
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 1928년 7월 29일 출생. 일본 침략 중 1940년 가족과 함께 홍콩으로 피신. 15세 때 아버지가 결핵으로 사망. 학교를 중퇴하고 가족 부양을 위해 일하기 시작. 플라스틱 무역회사의 세일즈맨으로 시작하여 하루 16시간 근무

careerTimeline.event: Fled mainland China to Hong Kong as refugee at age 12
Began working in plastics trading company as salesman at age 14 after father's death
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 사망 후 14세에 플라스틱 무역회사에서 영업사원으로 근무 시작

careerTimeline.event: Promoted to factory manager at age 18 after proving exceptional sales ability
careerTimeline.eventKo: 탁월한 영업 능력을 입증하여 18세에 공장 매니저로 승진

careerTimeline.event: Founded Cheung Kong Inc. at age 21, beginning with plastic watchbands and flowers manufacturing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 21세에 플라스틱 시계밴드와 조화 제조로 장강 주식회사(Cheung Kong Inc.) 설립

careerTimeline.event: Cheung Kong expanded into property development in Hong Kong
careerTimeline.eventKo: 장강이 홍콩 부동산 개발 사업으로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Acquired controlling interest in Hutchison Whampoa; first Chinese businessman to buy major British-owned trading company
careerTimeline.eventKo: 허치슨 화이트폴 인수 사업에 통제권 획득. 주요 영국 소유 무역회사를 사들인 첫 번째 중국계 기업가

careerTimeline.event: Acquired Hongkong Electric Holdings, renamed to Power Assets Holdings Limited
careerTimeline.eventKo: 홍콩 일렉트릭 홀딩스(Hongkong Electric Holdings) 인수, 파워 애셋 홀딩스 리미티드로 개명

careerTimeline.event: Acquired controlling stake in Canadian oil and gas producer Husky Energy during oil price collapse
careerTimeline.eventKo: 유가 폭락 중 캐나다 석유가스 생산 업체 허스키 에너지(Husky Energy) 지분 취득

careerTimeline.event: Sold Orange PCS mobile network in Europe to Mannesmann for $14.6 billion in cash and equity
careerTimeline.eventKo: 유럽의 오렌지 PCS 모바일 네트워크를 만네스만에 146억 달러(현금 및 주식)에 매각

careerTimeline.event: Received Forbes magazine's first Malcolm S. Forbes Lifetime Achievement Award
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포브스 매거진의 첫 번째 말콤 포브스 평생공헌상 수상

careerTimeline.event: Completed major restructuring separating CK Asset Holdings and consolidating businesses under CK Hutchison Holdings
careerTimeline.eventKo: CK 애셋 홀딩스를 분리하고 사업을 CK 허치슨 홀딩스 하에 통합하는 주요 구조조정 완료

careerTimeline.event: Retired from chairman roles in CK Hutchison Holdings and CK Asset Holdings; assumed senior advisor position
careerTimeline.eventKo: CK 허치슨 홀딩스 및 CK 애셋 홀딩스의 회장직에서 퇴임. 선임 고문 직책 수임

failures.description: Factory fire destroyed early plastics manufacturing facility, threatening business survival
failures.descriptionKo: 공장 화재로 초기 플라스틱 제조 시설 파괴. 사업 생존을 위협하는 상황 발생
failures.lesson: Learned to face adversity with humility and transparency; called staff meeting, confessed failings, and promised workers would return when business recovered. This crisis strengthened employee loyalty and supplier relationships through personal apologies and debt renegotiation
failures.lessonKo: 역경에 겸손함과 투명성으로 대처하는 법을 배움. 직원 회의를 소집하여 자신의 실수를 고백하고 사업 회복 시 직원들이 돌아올 것을 약속. 이 위기는 개인적 사과와 채무 재협상을 통해 직원 충성도와 공급자 관계를 강화

failures.description: Plastic flower business began to stagnate as market preferences shifted
failures.descriptionKo: 시장 선호도 변화에 따라 플라스틱 조화 사업이 정체되기 시작
failures.lesson: Learned to anticipate market trends and pivot strategies preemptively. Made strategic decision to switch production to plastic toys before the plastic flower market collapsed completely
failures.lessonKo: 시장 트렌드를 예상하고 전략을 선제적으로 전환하는 법을 배움. 플라스틱 조화 시장이 완전히 붕괴하기 전에 플라스틱 장난감 생산으로 전환하는 전략적 결정을 내림

failures.description: Heavy exposure to Thai baht during Asian Financial Crisis caused significant losses in Hutchison Whampoa portfolio
failures.descriptionKo: 아시아 금융위기 중 태국 바트에 대한 많은 노출이 허치슨 화이트폴 포트폴리오에 상당한 손실 초래
failures.lesson: Implemented stronger currency risk management and diversification strategies; became more cautious about foreign exchange exposure in future investments
failures.lessonKo: 더 강력한 환율 위험 관리 및 다각화 전략 도입. 향후 투자에서 외환 노출에 대해 더욱 신중하게 접근

quotes.text: Broaden your vision, and maintain stability while advancing forward. That is my philosophy.
quotes.textKo: 시야를 넓히고 전진하면서 안정성을 유지하라. 그것이 나의 철학이다.
quotes.context: Core approach to business strategy and personal development
quotes.contextKo: 기업 전략 및 개인 발전에 대한 핵심 접근법

quotes.text: A good reputation for yourself and your company is an invaluable asset not reflected in the balance sheets.
quotes.textKo: 자신과 회사를 위한 좋은 평판은 재무제표에 반영되지 않는 귀중한 자산이다.
quotes.context: On the importance of ethical business conduct and trust
quotes.contextKo: 윤리적 사업 행위와 신뢰의 중요성에 대하여

quotes.text: You can believe in Fung Shui if you want, but ultimately people control their own fate.
quotes.textKo: 원한다면 풍수를 믿을 수 있지만, 궁극적으로 사람들은 자신의 운명을 통제한다.
quotes.context: On personal responsibility and agency in life outcomes
quotes.contextKo: 개인의 책임과 인생 결과에 대한 행위 능력에 대하여

quotes.text: Your life is meaningful if you can honestly say that you have done your best to do some good.
quotes.textKo: 당신의 인생은 진실하게 선한 일을 하기 위해 최선을 다했다고 말할 수 있다면 의미 있다.
quotes.context: On the purpose of life and legacy

quotes.text: There are things that might bring in a lot of money but I wouldn't do. A person has to be able to look beyond money. As long as we can keep our dignity, life becomes more meaningful.
quotes.textKo: 많은 돈을 벌 수 있지만 하지 않을 일들이 있다. 사람은 돈을 초월하여 볼 수 있어야 한다. 우리가 존엄성을 유지하는 한, 인생은 더 의미 있어진다.
quotes.context: On ethical boundaries and the limits of profit-seeking
quotes.contextKo: 윤리적 경계와 이윤 추구의 한계에 대하여

authored.title: The Art of Management
authored.note: Collection of Li Ka-shing's management philosophy and principles published by Li Ka Shing Foundation
authored.noteKo: 리 카싱 재단에서 출간한 리 카싱의 경영 철학과 원칙 모음

recommended.title: Li Ka-shing: Hong Kong's Elusive Billionaire
recommended.author: Anthony B. Chan
recommended.why: Comprehensive biography following his journey from refugee to Asia's richest businessman, covering his rise from 1940s Hong Kong through major acquisitions including Hutchison Whampoa takeover
recommended.whyKo: 난민에서 아시아 최고 부자가 되기까지의 여정을 따르는 종합 전기. 1940년대 홍콩에서의 부상부터 허치슨 화이트폴 인수를 포함한 주요 인수까지 다룸

recommended.title: Li Ka-Shing and Cheung Kong Holdings: A biography of one of China's greatest entrepreneurs
recommended.author: Yan Qicheng
recommended.why: Details how Li transformed Cheung Kong into a conglomerate spanning transportation, real estate, financial services, retail and energy sectors
recommended.whyKo: 리 카싱이 운송, 부동산, 금융서비스, 소매, 에너지 부문을 아우르는 대규모 기업집단으로 장강을 변신시킨 방법을 상세히 기술

recommended.title: Li Ka-shing 50 years in business philosophy
recommended.author: Anonymous/Archive
recommended.why: Reference collection examining five decades of business philosophy and decision-making that shaped the Li empire
recommended.whyKo: 리 카싱 제국을 형성한 50년 경영 철학과 의사결정을 검토하는 참고 자료 모음

personalTraits.knownFor: Known as 'Superman of Hong Kong', visionary business acumen, ability to identify emerging market opportunities, remarkable foresight in predicting economic trends, ethical leadership, humility despite extreme wealth, simplicity in personal lifestyle despite billionaire status
personalTraits.knownForKo: '홍콩의 슈퍼맨'으로 알려짐. 비전 있는 사업 감각, 신흥 시장 기회 발굴 능력, 경제 트렌드 예측의 뛰어난 통찰력, 윤리적 리더십, 극단적 부에도 불구한 겸손함, 억만장자 지위에도 불구한 개인 생활의 소박함
personalTraits.philanthropy: Established Li Ka Shing Foundation in 1980 supporting education, healthcare, and disaster relief across Hong Kong and mainland China. Donated hundreds of millions for universities, hospitals, and charitable causes
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 1980년 리 카싱 재단을 설립하여 홍콩과 중국 본토 전역에 교육, 보건, 재난 구호 지원. 대학, 병원, 자선 사업을 위해 수억 달러 기부
personalTraits.controversies: Faced criticism over foreign exchange exposure during Asian Financial Crisis; some controversy regarding business practices during acquisitions; scrutiny in recent years regarding Panama Canal involvement and various regulatory matters, though he maintains strong reputation overall
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 아시아 금융위기 중 외환 노출에 대한 비판 직면. 인수 당시 사업 관행 관련 논란. 최근 파나마 운하 관련 및 여러 규제 사항 관련 검토를 받았으나, 전반적으로 강력한 평판 유지

pivotalMentors.name: Factory manager at plastics trading company
pivotalMentors.relationship: Early employer who recognized his sales talent
pivotalMentors.influence: Promoted Li to factory manager at 18; provided crucial early business education and responsibility

pivotalMentors.name: Business contacts and suppliers during early Cheung Kong years
pivotalMentors.relationship: Colleagues and partners in plastics industry
pivotalMentors.influence: Helped Li navigate suppliers, customers, and banks during early factory crises, teaching him relationship-building and negotiation skills

pivotalMentors.name: British business executives at Hutchison Whampoa
pivotalMentors.influence: Mentored Li in managing large multinational conglomerates and international business operations

additionalInsights.dailyRoutine: Wakes up at 5:59 AM every morning. Works 12 hours a day, maintaining this schedule for over 60 years. Daily breakfast consists of vermicelli, an egg, and milk, kept to less than $20 daily living expenses. After dinner, watches 20 minutes of English TV to practice language skills, then reads before bedtime. Spends over 90% of planning time thinking 5-10 years ahead rather than immediate present concerns
keyAnecdotes: When factory fire destroyed his early plastics business, Li called a staff meeting, publicly confessed his failings, apologized to remaining workers, and promised they would return once business recovered. He personally visited suppliers, banks, and customers asking to extend payment deadlines, rebuilding trust through humility

During the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis, as warned in 2006 by Li's foresight, he had already reduced company debt and prepared defensive strategies. While others suffered, his company emerged relatively safe

Despite being Asia's richest person, Li lives extremely simply: same house for decades in Deep Water Bay, wears inexpensive Seiko wristwatch and simple black shoes, maintains frugal daily routine worth under $20/day
additionalInsights.turningPoint: The death of his father at age 15 forced Li to become the family provider at a young age. This tragedy taught him responsibility, resilience, and the value of hard work. His willingness to take on factory manager responsibilities at 18 demonstrated readiness for entrepreneurship. The major turning point in empire-building came in 1979 when he purchased Hutchison Whampoa, becoming the first Chinese businessman to acquire a major British trading company—this transformed him from property developer to conglomerate builder
additionalInsights.managementStyle: Transformational leadership combining delegation, empowerment, and continuous innovation. Emphasizes ethical conduct, transparency, and integrity as foundation of business. Practices exceptional humility and humility-based leadership, leading by example with simple lifestyle. Believes in team work and group decision-making rather than autocratic control. Uses leverage principle to maximize resource efficiency. Demonstrates continuous learning orientation, adapting to market changes without resting on past successes. Combines visionary long-term thinking with stability, avoiding excessive optimism or pessimism during market cycles. Focuses on building organizational values and culture that sustain success across decades
